_comment_top: Copy to scanner_config.json and edit. Every key is optional; missing => sensible default.
_comment_profile: Profiles: fast, full, active-lab, api-focused, passive-only.
_comment_validation: Phase 2 runs only tools justified by discovery. intensity: safe, active, aggressive-lab. Full ZAP and destructive writes should stay aggressive-lab only.
_comment_zap_network: Container-to-container networking for ZAP (recommended on WSL2 if your target is also a container).
_comment_seed: extra_endpoints stack on top of crawl/fingerprint candidates. No preset is shipped — the tool is meant to be generic.
_comment_open_redirect: Names of query parameters that look like redirect targets. The probe only retries URLs the crawler already produced.
_comment_stateful: Optional stateful probes. Provide concrete paths/payloads — the scanner ships no built-in defaults.
_comment_authenticated_probes: OPT-IN. Crawl-driven authenticated harness. JWT-none / forged remember-me probes default OFF and additionally require --experimental-auth.
_comment_authenticated_public_paths: Omit key for default ONE fetch of /api to merge catalog URLs. Use [] to disable public catalog ingestion entirely.
_comment_experimental_auth: Destructive opt-in probes. Require --experimental-auth AND fully-supplied paths/payloads/identities. Empty values disable the probe.
_comment_browser: Optional Playwright mode. Install with: python -m pip install playwright && python -m playwright install chromium
_comment_llm_probe: Provide an explicit chat/completions URL OR rely on discovery surfacing /chat, /v1/chat, /assistant, etc.
_comment_auth: Optional generic login support. Leave disabled unless you have lab credentials.
